specific_question: What percentage of the IT desk tickets can the chatbot of MediConn Solutions' AI-integrated ITSM resolve?
answer: MediConn Solutions' AI-integrated ITSM tool includes an AI chatbot that addresses up to 90% of IT desk tickets, significantly speeding up response times as reported by its IT department.
